name: Lemon Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and place in a bowl.
2. Set the bowl on top of hot water to soften the gelatin.
3. Mix until dissolved.
4. Beat egg yolks in a medium bowl until blended.
5. Gradually add half the sugar, continuing to beat until ribbon forms (about 3-5 minutes).
6. Add lemon juice and zest, then the gelatin.
7. Refrigerate for 10 minutes, stirring every two minutes or until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
8. Whip cream until stiff.
9. In a separate bowl, whip egg whites until soft peaks form.
10. Gradually add remaining sugar, one tablespoon at a time, while continuing to beat until stiff but not dry.
11. Gently fold the egg-yolk mixture into the whipped egg whites until no streaks are left.
12. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
13. Spoon into serving bowls or individual dessert dishes.
14. Refrigerate for 3 hours before serving.
15. Garnish with mint and lemon slices.
